interaction_phrase: According to 2018 data from AngelList published at Enterprise Greece
occurrence_sentence: According to [2018 data from AngelList published at Enterprise Greece](https://www.enterprisegreece.gov.gr/images/public/The-Greek-Startup-Scene_2018.pdf), a social network site for investors and startups, there were approximately 550 startups and over 2800 investors operating in the country.
Founded in Patras, Achaia, the regional capital of western Greece in 2019, PiDust is the brainchild of innovative entrepreneurs Vasilis Armaos, Paraskevas Deligiannis and Dimitris Badounas.

According [2018 data from AngelList published at Enterprise Greece](https://www.enterprisegreece.gov.gr/images/public/The-Greek-Startup-Scene_2018.pdf), a social network site for investors and startups, there were approximately 550 startups and over 2800 investors operating in the country.
